title: Port or Transport Observation (fact_port_or_transport_observation)
description: An observation about a logistics node or transport operation: port throughput, port calls, vessel activity, transit time, service reliability. Named 'port_or_transport' deliberately -- the same contract carries an airport, border crossing or rail terminal observation for later Air/Land modules.

operational_interpretation.description: What this metric may and may not be used to claim. 'volume_only' means the metric measures how much moved and can never on its own support a congestion, delay or capacity-shortage conclusion (WO-010 Gate F port rules). 'operational_condition' is reserved for metrics that directly measure an operational condition such as waiting time or berth occupancy.

resolution.description: Actual geographic resolution of the observation. A regional figure must never be displayed as if it were port-level.
